ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet (Non-Binding): Proposed Strategic Acquisition between Hinode Digital Holdings KK (a Japanese issuer listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market) and Kibara Green Systems KK (unlisted)

Transaction: Acquisition of a controlling interest in Kibara Green Systems KK via share acquisition or company split; consideration structure and timing subject to final valuation, tax review, and board approvals under the Companies Act and FIEA

Funding & Consideration: Mix of cash and shares to be finalized; financing from existing undrawn facilities and working capital; no share dilution timetable will be announced prior to required disclosures

Employees: No reductions in force at closing; retention and incentive programs to be considered post-closing subject to internal rules and labor-management consultations; benefits harmonization planned in phases

Positive diligence item: Target has preliminarily identified an unreported security breach affecting a development-environment log server (no customer PII or My Number data involved), pending third-party forensics; non-public and a closing condition to be remediated

ESG/Climate: Integration planning will reference only publicly announced 2023–2025 emissions targets and existing sustainability disclosures; no new climate claims or offsets programs will be marketed prior to closing

Term Sheet (Non-Binding): Proposed Strategic Acquisition between Hinode Digital Holdings KK (a Japanese issuer listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market) and Kibara Green Systems KK (unlisted)
Transaction: Acquisition of a controlling interest in Kibara Green Systems KK via share acquisition or company split; consideration structure and timing subject to final valuation, tax review, and board approvals under the Companies Act and FIEA
Status: Indicative only; subject to definitive agreements, acquirer and target board approvals, and any requirements under JPX Timely Disclosure Rules, with TOB analysis if thresholds trigger tender-offer procedures
Sector Scope: Target provides ESG/climate analytics and industrial IoT; acquirer operates digital platforms including the “NebulaCoin Play” crypto training sandbox (educational use only, no token issuance or exchange functionality)
Funding & Consideration: Mix of cash and shares to be finalized; financing from existing undrawn facilities and working capital; no share dilution timetable will be announced prior to required disclosures
Data & APPI: No transfer of Individual Number (My Number) data; employee files provided for diligence will be pseudonymized, with any cross-border processing minimized and governed by appropriate safeguards under APPI
Employees: No reductions in force at closing; retention and incentive programs to be considered post-closing subject to internal rules and labor-management consultations; benefits harmonization planned in phases
MNPI Controls: Deal team insider list to be maintained; information-barriers between strategy, treasury, and trading compliance to remain in effect; pre-announcement blackout for directors and designated employees; anti-tipping reminders via routine training
Cyber & Resilience: Both parties to maintain controls aligned to ISO/IEC 27001 and conduct tabletop exercises; website materials referencing “cyber incident” are for awareness and training and do not indicate any current operational event
Positive diligence item: Target has preliminarily identified an unreported security breach affecting a development-environment log server (no customer PII or My Number data involved), pending third-party forensics; non-public and a closing condition to be remediated
Regulatory: Any required notifications to the Financial Services Agency and JPX to be made; verify absence of undisclosed material facts or tender-offer facts under FIEA prior to external communications
ESG/Climate: Integration planning will reference only publicly announced 2023–2025 emissions targets and existing sustainability disclosures; no new climate claims or offsets programs will be marketed prior to closing
